instruction.assembly: LDA r30, [p3, #0]; MOVX r29, #15; MOV dc0, #0
MOVA dj1, #32; MOVX r25, #63; MOV dn5, #7
MOVA m1, #544; MOVX r28, #14; MOV dn2, #7
MOVA dj5, #-480; MOVX r26, #818; MOV dn6, #7
MOVA dn1, #15; AND r27, r27, r29; MOV s0, #0
MOVA dn4, #15; MOVX crSat, r30; MOV crRnd, r27
MOVA r24, #819; MOVX r27, #39; MOV dj4, #480
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; NOPX; MOV dc6, #0; NOPV
VLDA wl0, [p1, #512]; VLDB wl2, [p0, #32]; MOVX lc, #4
VLDA.3D wl3, [p1], d1; VLDB.3D wl1, [p0], d2
VLDA.3D amlh4, [p0], d2; VLDB.3D wl5, [p1], d1
VLDA.3D amlh4, [p0], d2; VLDB.3D wl6, [p1], d1; VSHUFFLE x0, x0, x8, r28
VLDA wl3, [p1, #512]; VSHUFFLE x3, x3, x6, r28
VLDB.3D wl4, [p1], d1; VMOV wl10, amll4; VMAC cm1, cm0, x0, x2, r24
VLDA wl9, [p1, #512]; VMOV wl8, amlh4; VMAC cm0, cm0, x3, x2, r24
VLDA amll4, [p0, #32]; VLDB.3D wl6, [p1], d1; VSHUFFLE x2, x4, x7, r28; VMAC cm2, cm0, x3, x1, r24
VLDA wl3, [p1, #512]; VSHUFFLE x5, x5, x11, r28; VMAC cm3, cm0, x0, x1, r24
VLDA.3D amlh4, [p0], d2; VLDB.3D wl4, [p1], d1
VLDA wl9, [p1, #512]; VMOV wl10, amll4; VMAC cm1, cm1, x2, x10, r26
VLDA amll4, [p0, #32]; VLDB.3D wl6, [p1], d1; VSHUFFLE x2, x9, x3, r28; VMAC cm0, cm0, x5, x10, r26
VLDA wl3, [p1, #512]; VSHUFFLE x5, x6, x4, r28; VMAC cm3, cm3, x2, x8, r26
VLDA.3D amlh4, [p0], d2; VLDB.3D wl4, [p1], d1; NOPS; NOPX; VMOV wl8, amlh4; VMAC cm2, cm2, x5, x8, r26
VMOV wl10, amll4; VMAC cm1, cm1, x2, x10, r26
VSHUFFLE x2, x9, x3, r28; VMAC cm0, cm0, x5, x10, r26
VSHUFFLE x5, x6, x4, r28; VMAC cm3, cm3, x2, x8, r26
VMOV wl8, amlh4; VMAC cm2, cm2, x5, x8, r26
VMOV wl0, amll4; VMAC cm0, cm0, x5, x10, r26
VMAC cm2, cm2, x5, x8, r26
VMOV wl7, amlh4; VMAC cm3, cm3, x2, x8, r26
VSHUFFLE x5, x6, x4, r28; VMAC cm1, cm1, x2, x10, r26
VMAC cm2, cm2, x5, x7, r26
VMAC cm3, cm3, x2, x7, r26
VMAC cm0, cm0, x5, x0, r26
VMAC cm1, cm1, x2, x0, r26
JNZD r25, r25, p3; VSHUFFLE x0, x0, x1, r27
VST.3D wl0, [p2], d0; VSHUFFLE x2, x1, x1, r27
VST.3D wl0, [p2], d0; VSHUFFLE x7, x7, x1, r27
MOVA r3, #-1; PADDB [sp], #32; MOVX r0, #0; MOV r2, p7
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; NOPX; MOV p7, p0; NOPV
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; NOPX; NOPM; NOPV
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; NOPX; MOV p7, p0; NOPV
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; MOV p0, p7
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; NOPX; NOPM; NOPV
NOPA; NOPB; NOPS; NOPX; NOPM; NOPV
